product.title: Max Factor Panstik Foundation, No.13 Nouveau Beige
featureBullets: This handy stik foundation gives you full coverage with less effort
It is recommended for daily use please store in a cool dry place
Formulated to cover and color naturally, in an easy to use, swivel-up stick
Helps conceal pigmentations, birthmarks and blemishes
Slips on lightly for a silky-matte finish
Smoothes away appearance of fine lines and wrinkles
product.description: Panstik Foundation has rich, creamy texture glides on easily, and creates a perfect, dewy canvas for a great everyday foundation look. Ideal for on the go touch ups and great at covering blemishes and pigmentation.
product.stockWarning: Only 17 left in stock - order soon.

specification.value: #15,409 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #164 in Foundation Makeup

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find the foundation provides full coverage without caking, applies easily and isn't heavy or cakey, stays on all day, and creates a flawless look with a hint of dewy finish. The product receives positive feedback for its quality and natural appearance. However, the color receives mixed reviews, with some finding it perfect for their skin tone while others say it's too light, and opinions on value are divided between those who find it worth the price and those who consider it too expensive for the small amount. The size is also criticized, with customers noting the tube is much smaller than expected.

reviews.reviewTitle: Small but worth it! Lasts a long time
reviews.reviewText: I REALLY love this makeup! I was worried it was going to be too dark for me, but it was perfect! It goes on smoothly and the coverage is more medium but it blends so well and it’s buildable. It lasts all day for me and it wasn’t sticky. It’s nice and lightweight, not heavy at all. If you are older like me, or typically go heavier on moisturizers, serums, etc, give it all time to soak in or this foundation will look bad because it will just sit on top of your skin. It’s already moisturizing, so go light or skip some of your pre-makeup applications. I never should have stopped using this back in the day. I’ll try to add pictures later.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 17, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Versatile and Full-Coverage Foundation – A Must-Have for Flawless Skin!
reviews.reviewText: I recently tried the Max Factor Pan Stik Foundation in True Beige, and I have to say, it has quickly become one of my go-to makeup products. This foundation is a game-changer, offering a range of benefits that make it perfect for anyone looking for full coverage and easy application. Packaging and Application: The Max Factor Pan Stik comes in a sleek, portable stick format that makes it easy to apply directly to the skin without needing brushes or sponges. The packaging is compact and travel-friendly, making it a great choice for on-the-go touch-ups. I love how easy it is to swipe on and blend—whether I’m applying it to my face in the morning or using it for quick touch-ups during the day, the stick format is convenient and hassle-free. Coverage and Finish: The True Beige shade is a perfect match for my skin tone, providing a natural-looking finish. This foundation gives full coverage with just one swipe, effectively covering blemishes, redness, and uneven skin tone. It has a creamy consistency that blends effortlessly into the skin, leaving behind a smooth, even canvas. Despite its full coverage, it doesn’t feel heavy or cakey. The finish is more matte but still looks natural, without the powdery, dry effect some other full-coverage foundations can give. It’s perfect for those who want to hide imperfections while maintaining a skin-like, non-oily look. Longevity and Wear: One of the standout features of the Max Factor Pan Stik is its long-lasting power. I wore it for an entire workday, and by the end of the day, my makeup still looked fresh. It holds up well in both hot and humid conditions and doesn’t slide off or fade away after a few hours. The foundation stays in place and maintains its smooth texture throughout the day, making it an excellent choice for long wear. Blendability: The creamy texture of this foundation makes it incredibly blendable. I can easily apply it with my fingers, a beauty sponge, or a brush, and it always blends seamlessly into my skin. Whether I’m applying a light layer for a more natural look or layering it on for more coverage, it doesn’t streak or leave uneven patches. Skin Feel: Despite offering full coverage, the Max Factor Pan Stik doesn’t feel heavy on the skin. It’s comfortable to wear throughout the day and doesn’t clog pores or cause breakouts. My skin feels breathable, and I don’t feel like I’m wearing a mask of makeup. It’s moisturizing enough to keep my skin from feeling dry, but not too greasy, making it a great option for both dry and combination skin types. Versatility: This foundation stick is also super versatile. It works great for both foundation application and contouring. The creamy formula makes it easy to build up layers for contouring and highlighting, making it a multi-purpose product for any makeup routine. Final Thoughts: The Max Factor Pan Stik Foundation in True Beige is a must-have in my makeup bag. Its full coverage, long-lasting wear, and natural finish make it a standout product that can be worn every day or for special occasions. It’s affordable, easy to use, and delivers great results. Whether you’re looking for flawless coverage or a convenient, portable option for on-the-go, this product is perfect for achieving a smooth, even complexion. I highly recommend it to anyone looking for a reliable, full-coverage foundation that’s both practical and effective!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 6, 2025

reviews.reviewText: This is the best foundation ever! I am in my 50's and I am so sorry to see that Max factor isn't available in the USA anymore, unless you purchase it here. I remember this brand in my teens & 20's. It really is high performing and covers everything! I hope it comes back to be sold again in drugstores, there is nothing like it.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 2, 2026

reviews.reviewText: This is a really great product! It is very easy and quick to apply. Covers imperfections nicely, also working as a concealer. ... I give this product 4 out of 5 stars because the colors run very light. I purchased the #12 True beige, it appears on the skin as more of an Ivory/light color. This foundation blends very well making it a go-to product for those who like a quick & easy makeup routine!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 1, 2026

reviews.reviewText: This concealer is perfect for hiding little imperfections. It's not heavy, doesn't cake in crevices, and lasts all day. My mother used this product. I'm 61 and I use it! For a product to be on the market this long, lots of people must be buying it to keep it in demand.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 20, 2026

reviews.reviewText: It is small but I love it! Have always loved this product. Goes on smoothly and is easily blended. 💯
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 8, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Influenced to try this as I was hoping it was a cheaper alternative to the Makeup Forever HD stick. Sadly, this didn’t live up to the hype or the MUFE stick. Firstly, the shade range obviously sucks but it’s a very old makeup line that I believe is no longer in production. I have fair neutral skin so I went with Fair 25, even though the reviews and research I did showed it was going to lean pinkish. The shade was t horrible but definitely pinkish but easily fixed by using a few dots of a more neutral foundation. Even in the areas I didn’t mix foundations, this stuff feels heavier on the skin and I wanted to wash my face quickly after applying. I kept it on for about 6 hours and noticed it was breaking up a lot around my mouth/ nose. The coverage is medium to full and on my dry skin it seemed to do ok, although setting it with powder was a bad idea- it became cakey pretty quickly- but if you do not set it it feels creamy the whole time and I can’t stand that. Overall I think I will like this more as a concealer than a full face product. It easily blends out but my favorite stick foundations are still Bobbi Brown or MUFE HD stick…sadly they’re both much more expensive. The makeup revolution stick is nice as well but difficult to find as it is also discontinued.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on May 16, 2024

reviews.reviewText: Full coverage and great color. I recently use them with a brush and it blends well. These are becoming so hard to find.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 9, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: The best buildable full coverage foundation
reviews.reviewText: My go-to for photoshoots, nights out or bad skin days. The shades are a bit off, but workable. The best buildable coverage that I have found in a mess-free stick.
